history.reason: Starting fresh pipeline for atrial fibrillation targeting CDW
Literature discovery completed. >70 PMIDs, 7 questions, three-pass strategy.
Reviewer verified PMIDs, found BRAIN-AF/ASPIRE, confirmed no-TTE claims. Q1-Q4 approved.
Q3 and Q4 FEASIBLE, Q1 and Q2 PARTIALLY FEASIBLE.
Protocol 1 (Apixaban vs Rivaroxaban in AF+CKD) accepted.
Protocol 2 (Early Rhythm vs Rate Control in elderly >=80) accepted.
Protocol 3 (OAC vs No OAC at CHA2DS2-VASc=1) accepted after revision.
P01 ACCEPT, P02 ACCEPT, P03 REVISE (minor). Coordinator applied fix.
